title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Select CityWalk - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Select CityWalk - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
